events.title: ASML added to StockLayer coverage
events.summary: ASML is now included in StockLayer's market data, risk and company tracking layer.
events.stockLayerLesson: Technology leaders are often judged by whether they can keep turning product relevance, platform scale and innovation into durable growth.

events.title: ASML reaches best available historical close
events.summary: ASML reached its best available historical closing price of USD 1777.77.
events.stockLayerLesson: A best-ever price can signal strong momentum, but future returns still depend on valuation, earnings delivery and expectations.
